title: verbascum floccosum var. gymnostemon
intro: Verbascum floccosum var. gymnostemon, also known as woolly mullein, is a biennial plant species in the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Verbascum floccosum var. gymnostemon include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, which can be attributed to its high mucilage content. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, often in combination with other herbs, to treat a range of health conditions.
